title: OFLC Announces Updates to the Foreign Labor Application Gateway (FLAG) System to Improve the User Experience. | Flag.dol.gov
content:
## OFLC Announces Updates to the Foreign Labor Application Gateway (FLAG) System to Improve the User Experience.
- When creating a new network, a new confirmation window has been introduced to help users from unintentionally creating new network groups.
- Changes have been made to some whitespace “trims” for better user experience.
